title: Bridge Essay: The self, its body and its brain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through The, self,, its, body, and.

**The self, its body and its brain.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 37550400. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-023-39959-w. The body is intrinsic to our sense of self and as such, any theoretical account of the self should also include contributions of the body. This Collection incorporates aseries of papers that demonstrate the inextricable relationship between body and self. The papers include studies of body illusions and studies of observed differences in bodily experience in participants with psychiatric and physical conditions.
